use_cases: Displaying KPIs and metrics in analytics dashboards
Showing percentage-based performance indicators with animated values
Visualizing business metrics with trend information and icons
Building dashboard widgets for SaaS and fintech applications
Creating compact data summaries in monitoring interfaces
ai_summary: A statistical card component designed for displaying animated metrics and KPIs in dashboard interfaces. Features a smooth number animation using Framer Motion, trend indicators, icon support, and accessibility labels. Built with Tailwind CSS and shadcn-style theming for a clean, professional appearance suitable for data visualization in various business applications.
